## Confidence tag

- [ ] `[AUTHOR-VERIFIED]` — I ran this on a real model and checked the result.
- [ ] `[VERIFIED-web]` — Cross-checked against vendor docs / known sources; not run locally.
- [ ] `[DOCS-ONLY]` — Taken from official documentation; clearly tagged in the text.
- [ ] `[NEEDS-HW-TEST]` — Plausible but untested; tagged as such.
- [ ] Not applicable (structural change, typo fix, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` stays lean — depth is in `references/`, not the router.
- [ ] New reference file (if any) has a one-line entry added to the `## References` section of `SKILL.md` and the `What's inside` table in `README.md`.
- [ ] No project-specific paths, hostnames, or credentials.
- [ ] Units are explicit throughout.
- [ ] Lines are under ~120 characters.
